This advisory has been withdrawn because it is a duplicate of GHSA-766v-q9x3-g744. This link is maintained to preserve external references.

## Original Description
PraisonAI before 1.5.115 contains a path traversal vulnerability in MultiAgentMonitor that fails to sanitize agent IDs when building file paths. Attackers can include traversal sequences like ../ in agent IDs to read, write, or overwrite arbitrary files, enabling sensitive disclosure, denial of service, or code execution.", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-fwh2-95jw-g4j6", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-19T21:33:26Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-fwh2-95jw-g4j6", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-fwh2-95jw-g4j6"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-06-18T23:16:19Z", "published_at": "2026-06-19T00:31:37Z", "references": ["https://github.com/MervinPraison/PraisonAI/security/advisories/GHSA-766v-q9x3-g744", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-56078", "https://github.com/MervinPraison/PraisonAI", "https://www.vulncheck.com/advisories/praisonai-arbitrary-file-read-and-write-via-path-traversal-in-multiagentmonitor", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-fwh2-95jw-g4j6"], "repository_advisory_url": null, "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "", "summary": "Duplicate Advisory: PraisonAI has Memory State Leakage and Path Traversal in MultiAgent Context Handling", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-19T21:33:29Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-fwh2-95jw-g4j6", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": null, "package": {"ecosystem": "pip", "name": "praisonai"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 1.5.114"}], "withdrawn_at": "2026-06-19T21:33:26Z"}

title: Duplicate Advisory: PraisonAI has Memory State Leakage and Path Traversal in MultiAgent Context Handling
